meta.title: Do We Handle Your Case? | Honorary Consulate of Hungary — New England
meta.description: Answer three questions and find out exactly which consular service applies to your situation — and whether Sylvia can help you from Derry, NH.

page.headline: Do We Handle Your Case?
page.subheadline: Answer three questions. Find out which service applies to your situation and how to get started.

contact.heading: Almost done — where should we send your result?
contact.subheading: Sylvia reviews every submission personally. If your situation needs a direct answer, she will reach out.
contact.name: Your name
contact.notePlaceholder: Any details that will help Sylvia understand your case before she follows up
contact.privacy: Your information is shared only with Sylvia. It is never sold or distributed.
contact.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.

authentication.heading: Consular Notarization & Authentication
authentication.body: This is Sylvia's core work. She authenticates signatures and notarizes documents for submission to Hungarian authorities — done in-person on Mondays in Derry, NH. Book your appointment, arrive with your document and valid ID, and leave with an authenticated document ready for Hungary.

citizenship.heading: Citizenship & Passport Services
citizenship.body: Sylvia assists with Hungarian citizenship confirmation, dual-citizenship documentation, and passport-related consular services. Some passport renewals go directly through the Embassy — she will tell you which track applies to your situation.

vital-records.heading: Vital Records Registration
vital-records.body: Births, marriages, and deaths involving Hungarian citizens need to be registered with Hungarian authorities. Sylvia handles the consular certification of these life events so the record exists in both systems — American and Hungarian.

legalization.heading: Diplomatic Legalization & Apostille
legalization.body: Making a US-issued document legally valid in Hungary requires a specific chain of authentication. Sylvia provides the consular step in that chain and guides you through every other step — so you don't spend money on the wrong process.

certificates.heading: Certificates of Good Conduct
certificates.body: Hungarian background checks and certificates of good conduct are commonly needed for employment, residency, or citizenship applications. Sylvia handles the consular certification needed to make these documents official on the American side.

scope.heading: Not Sure? Start Here.
scope.body: If your situation doesn't fit neatly into one category, you're not alone. Sylvia's full scope of services covers a wide range of consular needs. Review the complete list — and if you still have questions, book a Monday appointment to discuss your case in person.
scope.cta: See the Full Scope of Services

outside.heading: Sylvia Covers New England — Connecticut to Canada
outside.body: Sylvia's appointment covers Maine, Vermont, New Hampshire, Rhode Island, and Massachusetts. If you're in Connecticut, New York, or further south, the Hungarian Consulate General in New York City is the closest office. If you're willing to travel to Derry, NH, Monday appointments are available.
outside.cta: See the Full Scope of Services
